# TicDia

> TicDia is a TikTok-style Wikipedia reader: discover articles, on-this-day events, did-you-know facts, words of the day, and weather in a smooth vertical feed. Available in French and English, ad-free, mobile-first.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Vertical Wikipedia article feed.
- [Today](/today): Today's curated articles.
- [Discover](/discover): Search and browse Wikipedia topics.
- [Explore](/explore): Curated explore feed.
- [On This Day](/on-this-day): Historical events that happened on this date.
- [Did You Know](/did-you-know): Surprising Wikipedia facts.
- [Word Feed](/word-feed): Daily vocabulary with definitions.
- [Weather Feed](/weather): Scroll-based weather feed with map and forecast.
- [Recap](/recap): Personal reading recap and stats.

## Optional

- [Portfolio](/portfolio): About the project and showcase.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for saved articles and preferences.
